category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line tool for Vapor, a server-side Swift web framework; Vapor docs describe the Toolbox new-project workflow.
display_name_sources: The official vapor/toolbox repository calls it Vapor Toolbox; Vapor docs refer to the Toolbox command-line interface.
docs_sources: docs.vapor.codes is the official Vapor documentation; the legacy Toolbox page and official README document the CLI specifically.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/vapor/toolbox; per instructions it was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Vapor server-side Swift framework CLI; Vapor docs and toolbox README describe creating Vapor projects.
